arts.ttl: Havertz says Arsenal teammate can ‘turn games on his own’
arts.sum: Kai Havertz has called Martin Odegaard ‘magic’ and said the Arsenal captain can ‘turn games around on his own’. Odegaard’s return from injury has coincided with Arsenal’s improvement in results and performances. The Gunners have won three straight games since the international break, scoring 13 goals during victories over Nottingham Forest, Sporting Lisbon and West […] The post Havertz says Arsenal teammate can ‘turn games on his own’ first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Danish Football Union send clear warning to Manchester United ace Chido Obi-Martin
arts.sum: Man United youngster Chido Obi-Martin qualifies to play for Denmark, Nigeria and England at international level.

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta makes Cristiano Ronaldo prediction in major Bukayo Saka statement
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka has starred for Arsenal this term and proven himself to be among the Gunners most important players while looking up to how Cristiano Ronaldo approaches his career

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro drops early Ruben Amorim team news hint ahead of Man United vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United travel to face Arsenal in the Premier League on Wednesday evening

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Manchester United 25-26 Retro Jersey Leaked - Matching Third Kit Colors
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can exclusively reveal that Adidas will be launching Man United's new 2025-2026 retro uniform with the colors matching their 25-26 third shirt.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta calls up young Arsenal midfielder who does 'things you can't coach' to pre-Man United training
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United are set to lock horns in a huge Premier League clash at the Emirates Stadium on Wednesday night. Arsenal will be...

arts.ttl: Manchester United have 27 days to make simple Amad decision amid transfer clause
arts.sum: Amad has been one of Man United's most exciting players this season yet sees his contract expire in June - but that could be about to change.

arts.ttl: Man United 'interested' in Dutch wonderkid who could thrive in Ruben Amorim's 3-4-3 system
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly interested in signing Feyenoord midfielder Antoni Milambo during next summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man Utd dressing room UNHAPPY with latest move
arts.sum: The Red Devils players abandoned the club’s plans to wear an Adidas jacket in support of the LGBTQ+ community ahead of Sunday’s Premier League match against Everton. United were only planning a walk-out jacket as a show of support but defender Noussair Mazraoui told his team-mates he was not prepared to wear the outfit as he is of Muslim faith, reports The Athletic.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson has already told Ruben Amorim what he needs to change at Man United
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has had a positive start to his Manchester United tenure with two wins from three games so far
